steps.description: Type 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SLdragon/example-openapi-spec/refs/heads/main/petstore-official.yaml' into the "Enter OpenAPI Description Document URL" input box in the popup dialog in Visual Studio Code’s Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Press Enter to confirm the OpenAPI document URL input in the "Enter OpenAPI Description Document URL" dialog within Visual Studio Code.
@assertion there's GET /pet/{petId} exist.
Type 'get /store/order' into the operation search input field within the "Select Operation(s) Copilot Can Interact with" dialog in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension for Visual Studio Code.

Click the checkbox labeled "Toggle all checkboxes" in the "Select Operation(s) Copilot Can Interact with" dropdown dialog at the top of the Microsoft Visual Studio Code interface, within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension.
Undo the last action in the Visual Studio Code “Select Operation” input field (in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension) using keyboard shortcut: Ctrl+Z.
Undo the selection of the API endpoint “GET /store/order/{orderId}” in the Visual Studio Code “Select Operation” input dropdown by pressing the keyboard shortcut Ctrl+Z.
Undo the current selection in the "Select Operation" dropdown within Visual Studio Code's Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension using the keyboard shortcut Ctrl+Z.
Undo the most recent action in the "Select Operation" dropdown menu within the Visual Studio Code Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension interface by pressing Ctrl+Z.
Undo the selection of the API endpoint "GET /store/order/{orderId}" in the "Select Op" dropdown within Visual Studio Code's Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface using keyboard shortcut Ctrl+Z.
Undo the last action in the VS Code "Select Operation" dropdown by pressing Ctrl+Z while the API endpoint search field ("get /store/") is focused.
Undo the last action in the VS Code command palette search bar (currently filtering API endpoints with "get /store") by pressing Ctrl+Z.
Undo the last action in the Visual Studio Code command palette search field (top-center input) using the keyboard shortcut Ctrl+Z.
Undo the last action in the Visual Studio Code Command Palette search bar by pressing Ctrl+Z while the "Select Operation" dropdown with "GET /store/order/{orderId}" selected is active.
Undo typing in the "Select Op" command palette input field within the Visual Studio Code Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension by pressing Ctrl+Z.
Undo the previous text entry in the "Select Operation" search bar within Visual Studio Code's Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension interface using the keyboard shortcut Ctrl+Z.
Type 'username' into the API endpoint input box in the "Select Operation" dropdown at the top of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface within Visual Studio Code.

Click the "OK" button in the "Select Operation(s) Copilot Can Interact with" dialog to confirm the selection of the GET /user/{username} operation within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "OK" button in the "Select Operation(s) Copilot Can Interact with" dialog to confirm selected API operations within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Default folder /home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProject" option in the "Workspace Folder" dropdown within Visual Studio Code.
Press the F1 key to open the Command Palette in Visual Studio Code with the "VSCAUSE_APP_DVRPQ" workspace loaded.
Type 'Regenerate Plugin' into the VS Code command palette input box at the top of the Microsoft Visual Studio Code interface.
Press Enter to select "Microsoft 365 Agents: Regenerate Plugin" from the command palette in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "ai-plugin.json" file entry in the file selection dropdown within Visual Studio Code's "Select plugin manifest file" dialog.
Click on the "apiSpecificationFile/openapi.yaml" entry in the file selection dropdown within Visual Studio Code's "Select OpenAPI description document file" dialog.
Click the "GET /pet/findByStatus" option in the "Select operation(s) Copilot can interact with." dialog within Visual Studio Code, highlighting the selection in the API operations list.
Click the blue "add" button (plus icon) to the right of the "1 Selected" indicator in the "Select operation(s) Copilot can interact with." dialog within Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Regenerate" button in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit confirmation dialog within Visual Studio Code.
Click the "appPackage" folder in the Explorer panel of Visual Studio Code to expand its contents.
Click the "ai-plugin.json" file listed under the "appPackage" folder in the Explorer panel of Visual Studio Code.
@assertion text "findPetsByStatus" in the opened file ai-plugin.json
